name: image
description: Image with load state, blur-up placeholder, graceful fallback, and optional zoom

meta.name: Image
meta.description: Image with load state, blur-up placeholder, graceful fallback, and optional zoom

props.name: fallbackSrc
props.description: Image shown if src fails to load

props.name: zoom
props.description: When true, zooms the image on hover.

props.name: removeWrapper
props.description: Render a bare with no wrapper, placeholder, or zoom

props.name: isBlurred
props.description: When true, renders a blurred backdrop behind the image.

whenToUse: Displaying a content image that should show a placeholder while loading and degrade gracefully on error
Photos, thumbnails, or media that benefit from a blur-up placeholder or hover zoom
Any image where a broken src should fall back rather than show a broken-image icon
whenNotToUse: Identity thumbnails for a person or entity — use Avatar
Purely decorative shapes or a fixed-ratio layout box with no load behavior — use AspectRatio

antiPatterns.why: Without alt the image is invisible to assistive tech; pass an empty alt only for decorative images

related.name: Avatar
related.reason: Use Avatar for identity thumbnails with an initials fallback

related.name: AspectRatio
related.reason: Use AspectRatio for a ratio box that does not own image load behavior

intent.a11yRationale: role="img" with alt names the image; on error it shows a fallback image or neutral box so layout survives; the blur-up and zoom transitions are disabled under prefers-reduced-motion

flexibility.note: Pick the corner radius that matches the surrounding surface
Radius and placeholder colors must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens
